name: ScrollArea
searchText: scrollarea area with custom scrollbars @mantine/core /core/scroll-area offsetscrollbars onbottomreached onleftreached onrightreached onscrollpositionchange ontopreached overscrollbehavior scrollhidedelay scrollbarsize scrollbars startscrollposition type viewportprops viewportref

props.name: offsetScrollbars
props.description: Determines whether scrollbars should be offset with padding on given axis - true - adds padding to offset both scrollbars (always) - 'x' - adds padding to offset horizontal scrollbar (always) - 'y' - adds padding to offset vertical scrollbar (always) - 'present' - adds padding only when scrollbars are visible (dynamic)

props.name: onBottomReached
props.description: Called when scrollarea is scrolled to the bottom (within 0.8px tolerance for sub-pixel rendering)

props.name: onLeftReached
props.description: Called when scrollarea is scrolled to the left (within 0.8px tolerance for sub-pixel rendering)

props.name: onRightReached
props.description: Called when scrollarea is scrolled to the right (within 0.8px tolerance for sub-pixel rendering)

props.name: onScrollPositionChange
props.description: Called with current position (x and y coordinates) when viewport is scrolled

props.name: onTopReached
props.description: Called when scrollarea is scrolled all the way to the top

props.name: scrollHideDelay
props.description: Scroll hide delay in ms, applicable only when type is set to hover or scroll

props.name: scrollbarSize
props.description: Scrollbar size, any valid CSS value for width/height, numbers are converted to rem, default value is 12px (0.75rem)

props.name: scrollbars
props.description: Axis at which scrollbars must be rendered - 'x' - horizontal scrollbar only - 'y' - vertical scrollbar only - 'xy' - both scrollbars - false - no scrollbars rendered (content remains scrollable via mouse/touch)

props.name: startScrollPosition
props.description: Initial scroll position set on mount

type.name: { x?: number; y?: number | undefined; } | undefined

props.name: type
props.description: Defines scrollbars behavior - 'hover' – scrollbars visible on hover (default) - 'scroll' – scrollbars visible during scrolling - 'auto' – scrollbars visible only when content overflows (like CSS overflow: auto) - 'always' – scrollbars always visible, even when content doesn't overflow - 'never' – scrollbars always hidden

props.name: viewportProps
props.description: Props passed down to the viewport element
